subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Validate the project is correct and all necessary information is available

subcommands.name: initialize
subcommands.description: Initialize build state

subcommands.name: generate-sources
subcommands.description: Generate any source code for inclusion in compilation

subcommands.name: process-sources
subcommands.description: Process the source code

subcommands.name: generate-resources
subcommands.description: Generate resources for inclusion in the package

subcommands.name: process-resources
subcommands.description: Copy and process resources into the destination directory

subcommands.name: compile
subcommands.description: Compile the source code of the project

subcommands.name: process-classes
subcommands.description: Post-process the generated files from compilation

subcommands.name: generate-test-sources
subcommands.description: Generate any test source code for inclusion in compilation

subcommands.name: process-test-sources
subcommands.description: Process the test source code

subcommands.name: generate-test-resources
subcommands.description: Generate resources for inclusion in the test package

subcommands.name: process-test-resources
subcommands.description: Copy and process test resources into the test destination directory

subcommands.name: test-compile
subcommands.description: Compile the test source code

subcommands.name: process-test-classes
subcommands.description: Post-process the generated files from test compilation

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run tests using a suitable unit testing framework

subcommands.name: prepare-package
subcommands.description: Perform any operations necessary to prepare a package before packaging

subcommands.name: package
subcommands.description: Package the compiled code into a distributable format

subcommands.name: pre-integration-test
subcommands.description: Perform actions required before integration tests are executed

subcommands.name: integration-test
subcommands.description: Process and deploy the package for integration testing

subcommands.name: post-integration-test
subcommands.description: Perform actions required after integration tests have been executed

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.description: Run any checks to verify the package is valid and meets quality criteria

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install the package into the local repository

subcommands.name: deploy
subcommands.description: Copy the final package to the remote repository

subcommands.name: pre-clean
subcommands.description: Execute processes needed prior to the actual project cleaning

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Remove all files generated by the previous build

subcommands.name: post-clean
subcommands.description: Execute processes needed to finalize the project cleaning

subcommands.name: pre-site
subcommands.description: Execute processes needed prior to the actual project site generation

subcommands.name: site
subcommands.description: Generate the project site documentation

subcommands.name: post-site
subcommands.description: Execute processes needed to finalize site generation

subcommands.name: site-deploy
subcommands.description: Deploy the generated site documentation to the web server

subcommands.name: dependency:tree
subcommands.description: Display the dependency tree for this project

subcommands.name: dependency:resolve
subcommands.description: Resolve all project dependencies

subcommands.name: dependency:analyze
subcommands.description: Analyze project dependencies for unused and undeclared

subcommands.name: dependency:copy-dependencies
subcommands.description: Copy project dependencies to a specified directory

subcommands.name: versions:display-dependency-updates
subcommands.description: Display available dependency updates

subcommands.name: versions:display-plugin-updates
subcommands.description: Display available plugin updates

subcommands.name: help:effective-pom
subcommands.description: Display the effective POM with active profiles

subcommands.name: help:effective-settings
subcommands.description: Display the calculated settings

subcommands.name: help:describe
subcommands.description: Describe the attributes of a plugin or a plugin goal

subcommands.name: compiler:compile
subcommands.description: Compile Java source files

subcommands.name: surefire:test
subcommands.description: Run unit tests via the Surefire plugin

subcommands.name: failsafe:integration-test
subcommands.description: Run integration tests via the Failsafe plugin

subcommands.name: jar:jar
subcommands.description: Build a JAR from the current project

subcommands.name: war:war
subcommands.description: Build a WAR from the current project

subcommands.name: source:jar
subcommands.description: Bundle the project sources into a JAR

subcommands.name: javadoc:javadoc
subcommands.description: Generate project Javadoc

subcommands.name: release:prepare
subcommands.description: Prepare for a release in SCM

subcommands.name: release:perform
subcommands.description: Perform a release from SCM

subcommands.name: spring-boot:run
subcommands.description: Run the Spring Boot application

subcommands.name: spring-boot:repackage
subcommands.description: Repackage the application as an executable archive

subcommands.name: wrapper:wrapper
subcommands.description: Generate the Maven Wrapper files

name: -D
options.description: Define a system property (e.g. -Dproperty=value)

name: -P
options.description: Comma-delimited list of profiles to activate

name: -pl
--projects
options.description: Comma-delimited list of specified reactor projects to build

name: -am
--also-make
options.description: If project list is specified, also build projects required by the list

name: -amd
--also-make-dependents
options.description: If project list is specified, also build projects that depend on them

name: -U
--update-snapshots
options.description: Force a check for missing releases and updated snapshots

name: -o
--offline
options.description: Work offline

name: -f
--file
options.description: Force the use of an alternate POM file

name: -s
--settings
options.description: Alternate path for the user settings file

name: -X
--debug
options.description: Produce execution debug output

name: -e
--errors
options.description: Produce execution error messages

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Quiet output, only show errors

name: -B
--batch-mode
options.description: Run in non-interactive (batch) mode

name: -N
--non-recursive
options.description: Do not recurse into sub-projects

name: -T
--threads
options.description: Thread count for parallel builds (e.g. 2.0C, 4)

name: -nsu
--no-snapshot-updates
options.description: Suppress SNAPSHOT updates

name: -fae
--fail-at-end
options.description: Only fail the build afterwards; allow all non-impacted builds to continue

name: -ff
--fail-fast
options.description: Stop at first failure in reactorized builds

name: -fn
--fail-never
options.description: Never fail the build regardless of project result

name: -rf
--resume-from
options.description: Resume reactor from specified project

name: -DskipTests
options.description: Compile tests but skip running them

name: -Dmaven.test.skip=true
options.description: Skip compiling and running tests entirely
